---
title: Panache
url: https://panache.bz
author:
  - Johan Larsson
date: 2026-06-08
github: jolars/panache
pypi: panache-cli
npm: '\@panache-cli/panache'
crate: panache
image: logo.svg
categories: Rust, CLI
description: >
  Panache is a fast Rust-based language server, formatter, and linter for
  Pandoc, Quarto, and R Markdown, bringing modern editor tooling to prose
  documents.
citation:
  author:
    - family: Larsson
      given: Johan
  genre: R
  issued: 2026-03-28
  license: MIT
  source: GitHub
  title: >-
    Panache: A Language Server, Formatter, and Linter for Pandoc, Quarto, and R
    Markdown
  type: software
  URL: https://panache.bz
  version: 2.52.0
---
